CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2010 Continued To Feb-04-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-21-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Robert S. Aaron, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Molly Tracy.
No appearance by defendant MCT Associates, Inc. dba Bright Minds Institute.
Default was entered against defendant on April 22, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, December 21, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on December 20, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Molly Tracy, and against the Defaulted Defendant MCT Associates, Inc. dba Bright Minds Institute as follows:

Damages/Principal - $48,299.36.
Prejudgment Interest - $5,606.00.
Attorney's Fees - $9,262.50.
Penalties Per Labor Code Section 203 - $23,076.90.
Costs - $469.75., for a total judgment in the amount of $86,741.51.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
